calendar.matters:
Petition For Determination That Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Real Property To Petitioner Does Not Violate Any No-Contest Clause Which May Be Contained In Decedent'S Will
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-26-2012 Continued To Aug-22-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Neal McGettigan for Mary Lew. Mary Mayo for Nancy Siu. Richard Louie (Beneficiary) also present.

Ms. Mayo stated that she filed a no contest petition this morning with a hearing date of August 22, 2012. The Court advised Ms. Mayo that a no contest petition is no longer available. Ms. Mayo stated that she will proceed with filing a Petition to Determine Title of Real Property. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than August 17, 2012. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by August 17, 2012. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on August 22, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-08-2012 Continued To Jun-26-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Neal McGettigan for Mary Lew (Petitioner). Mary Mayo for Nancy Siu (Objector).

Counsel advised the Court that they are in agreement with regard to sale of the San Jose property and that there is an issue with an accounting for rents collected by one of the Administrators. The Accounting Petition was continued to June 26, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on sale of the property and the accounting of rents.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
